description.zh: DCGAN 为稳定的 GAN 图像生成提供了实用的卷积架构规则。它还展示了无标签学习到的判别器特征可以迁移到识别任务。
description.en: DCGAN supplied practical convolutional architecture rules for stable GAN image generation. It also showed that discriminator features learned without labels could transfer to recognition tasks.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
